name: Banana-Caramel Icebox Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 medium bananas, peeled and each cut into 18 rounds
Topping: fine crumbs from 2 additional graham cracker squares, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the bottom of an 8 x 4 x 2 inch loaf pan with half the graham cracker squares.
2. Beat the pudding mix and skim milk according to package directions.
3. Pour half of the pudding mixture into the loaf pan.
4. Top with half the banana slices.
5. Drizzle with the caramel ice cream topping.
6. Layer remaining crackers, pudding, and bananas.
7. Sprinkle cracker crumbs over top.
8. Cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours for flavors to develop.
9. To serve, spoon into dessert dishes.
Makes 6 servings. Per serving: 196 calories, 4g protein, 43g carbohydrates, 2g fat, 2mg cholesterol, 383 milligrams sodium.
